methodology: Use public store pages, official product pages, and Noctalia owned pages as the source of truth.
Prefer store-visible facts for ratings, downloads, privacy labels, platform support, and in-app purchase signals.
Do not claim that Noctalia is cheaper, more private, or medically safer than a competitor unless the exact source supports the comparison.
Prices, ratings, downloads, and subscription labels change by country and store; refresh before major publication or paid acquisition pushes.

noctalia.name: Noctalia
noctalia.positioning: Android-first AI dream journal for fast voice capture, structured reflection, generated dream images, symbols, and Dream Chat.

pricing.model: Freemium with premium plan advertised on Noctalia owned pages
publicPriceSignals: Onironaut premium advertised at EUR 2.99/month or EUR 19/year on Noctalia owned pricing copy
Google Play lists in-app purchases but does not expose the full purchase catalog publicly
pricing.comparisonRule: Use exact owned-site price where shown. Avoid broad 'cheaper than competitors' claims unless all compared store prices were rechecked in the same market.

strengths: AI analysis plus Dream Chat follow-up
Recurring symbols and dream dictionary surface
EU-hosted journal data disclosed in privacy copy
limitations: Android-first; no iOS App Store listing yet
Not an advanced lucid dreaming training product
Public social proof is early compared with established competitors
privacyNotes: Do not say 'only you can access' without qualification.
Safe claim: Noctalia does not sell personal data and does not display targeted advertising.
Safe claim: audio is used for transcription and is not persistently stored by Noctalia after processing.
Disclose AI, speech, infrastructure, and subscription providers when discussing privacy.
bestFor: Android users who forget dream details if they have to type
Users who want a reflective AI companion rather than a deterministic meaning oracle
Users who value visual dream memory and recurring symbol tracking
notIdealFor: Users seeking deep lucid dreaming alarms, audio cues, and technique coaching
Users who want offline-only or fully local AI processing

dreamapp.name: DreamApp
dreamapp.positioning: Mainstream dream interpretation app with dream dictionary, AI analysis, and therapist-guided messaging.

pricing.model: Free download with in-app purchases/subscription signals
publicPriceSignals: Apple App Store lists free download with in-app purchases
A visible Google Play review mentions an annual price around $60; treat as user-review evidence, not official pricing
pricing.comparisonRule: Do not publish exact DreamApp pricing as official unless verified in the store purchase flow or visible App Store IAP table for the target country.

storeSignals: Google Play showed 1M+ downloads, 4.0 stars, and about 12.5K reviews on 2026-05-20.
Apple App Store showed 4.6 stars from about 3.8K ratings on 2026-05-20.
Apple App Store listed English plus 29 more languages.
strengths: Strong mainstream interpretation and dream meaning positioning
Therapist-guided messaging may appeal to users looking for emotional framing
Broad localization signal on App Store
limitations: Public Play listing emphasizes text/reporting more than voice-first morning capture
Data safety labels disclose shared or collected data categories
Some public reviews complain about paywall, trial, cancellation, or support clarity
bestFor: Users who want a large, familiar dream meaning app
Users who prioritize public install/review volume
notIdealFor: Users whose first priority is fast Android voice capture after waking
Users who want generated dream visuals and Dream Chat as a core workflow
Users who want a privacy page that explains AI, audio, and providers in detail before signup
migrationNotes: Export or copy the dream text you want to keep before switching.
Move recurring symbols manually first, then rebuild tags and favorites in Noctalia.
Start with recent dreams rather than importing an entire archive at once.

oniri.name: Oniri
oniri.positioning: Mature dream journal and lucid dreaming app with AI interpretation, oral notes, generated images, statistics, export, and technique training.

pricing.model: Free download with Oniri Premium and full-version in-app purchase options
publicPriceSignals: Apple App Store lists Oniri Premium $12.99 and $47.99, Full version $49.99, Monthly Premium Subscription $0.99, and Yearly Premium Subscription $5.99 in the US listing
Google Play lists in-app purchases and Oniri Premium subscription copy
The App Store description states prices may vary by location
pricing.comparisonRule: Use the App Store IAP table only with country/date context; do not generalize it to every market.

storeSignals: Apple App Store showed 4.6 stars from about 3.6K ratings on 2026-05-20.
Google Play showed 10K+ downloads and about 269 reviews on 2026-05-20.
Google Play listing said the app was developed and tested for 10 years with dreamers.
strengths: Advanced lucid dreaming toolkit with reality checks, WILD, MILD, SSILD, and audio cues
Dream journal with oral notes, generated images, statistics, PDF export, and password lock
Strong App Store reputation and mature iOS presence
limitations: Less focused than Noctalia on Android-first quick voice capture as the primary use case
Premium gates several features including lucid tools, interpretation panel, vocal notes, statistics, images, and filtered PDF export
Users who do not want lucid dreaming training may find the product broader than necessary
bestFor: iOS users who want a mature dream journal plus lucid toolkit
Users who value PDF export, statistics, reminders, and technique libraries
notIdealFor: Android users whose main problem is capturing dreams fast before memory fades
Users who primarily want AI visual journaling and a focused reflection chat
Users who do not need lucid dreaming alarms or technique coaching
migrationNotes: Export PDFs or copy text from Oniri before switching.
Recreate symbol patterns in Noctalia from your most recurring themes.
Keep Oniri if lucid alarms and technique practice are the core habit; use Noctalia if capture and reflection are the core habit.
